entries.definition:
ḥ-f-f sides of a mountain; entourage; to surround, to encompass; to clip, to trim, edges; paucity of food. Of this root, two forms occur once each in the Qurʾan: حَفَفْنَا ḥafafnā and حَافِّينَ ḥāffīn.
حَفَّ ḥaffa u [v. trans.] to encircle, to surround (18:32) جَعَلْنَا لِأَحَدِهِمَا جَنَّتَيْنِ مِنْ أَعْنَابٍ وَحَفَفْنَاهُمَا بِنَخْلٍ وَجَعَلْنَا بَيْنَهُمَا زَرْعًا We made two gardens of grape vines, surrounded them with date palms and grew between them planted fields.

حَافِّينَ ḥāffīn [pl. of act. part. حَافّ ḥāff] encircling, surrounding (39:75) وَتَرَى الْمَلَائِكَةَ حَافِّينَ مِنْ حَوْلِ الْعَرْشِ يُسَبِّحُونَ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّهِمْ and you see the angels encircling the Throne, proclaiming the praise of their Lord.
